ksa_text: Skill in conducting iterative AI risk assessments across the system lifecycle, including risk identification and analysis at development and deployment phases, impact and likelihood estimation with proportionate documentation, and maintenance of risk registries with proxy indicators for unmeasurable risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Workforce diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility processes are prioritized in the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks throughout the lifecycle.

top_anchors.element_label: Workforce diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility processes are prioritized in the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks throughout the lifecycle.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-002 (AG, Skill) maps to BI Developer scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.5853 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.585, eu_ai_act=0.563, ddat=0.412. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within business intelligence development and analytics engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.5853 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-S-002 (AG, composite 0.5853) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.5853 for AG domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Strong signal across nist_ai_rmf=0.585, eu_ai_act=0.563, ddat=0.412 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.5853 exceeds external evidence threshold for AG domain inclusion in BI Developer.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5853, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
